name: Modular Home Construction
description: Built hundreds of modular homes across Japan — from foundation to roof, including framing, finishing, and safety compliance.

name: Shop Renovation
description: Prepared a small retail space with custom shelving, fixtures, and structural repairs.

name: Residential Wiring & Installation
description: Full residential electrical installation including panels, outlets, lighting circuits, and troubleshooting for homes in the Philippines.

name: Solar System Setup
description: Troubleshooting and installation of off-grid solar power systems for residential clients, including wiring and component checks.

name: Personal Portfolio
description: This website — built with HTML & CSS to present my skills and experience to potential employers and clients.

name: Solar PV Calc - Solar Designer
description: Calculates and design your solar needs
privacyContent:
Introduction

Welcome to Solar PV Calc - Solar Designer, developed by Daril Quervo. This Privacy Policy explains how I collect, use, and protect your information when you use the app. By using the app, you agree to this Privacy Policy.

Information I Collect

  • Usage data and device information for troubleshooting
  • Information you voluntarily provide when contacting support

How I Use Your Information

  • To provide and improve the app's functionality
  • To respond to support requests and fix bugs
  • To comply with legal obligations

Information Sharing

I do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties.

Third-Party Services

The app may use third-party services (such as Google Play Services or Apple frameworks) that have their own privacy policies.

Children's Privacy

This app is not directed to children under 13. I do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.

Your Rights

  • Access or request deletion of your personal data at any time
  • Opt out by uninstalling the app

Contact Me

Questions about this Privacy Policy?
darilquervo.dev@gmail.com
supportContent:
Frequently Asked Questions

The app won't open or keeps crashing

Try these steps: (1) Force close and reopen the app. (2) Restart your device. (3) Uninstall and reinstall from the store. (4) Make sure your OS is up to date.

How do I delete my account or data?

Email darilquervo.dev@gmail.com with the subject "Data Deletion Request". I will process it within 7 business days.

I found a bug

Please report it by email. Include your device model, OS version, and a description of what happened. Screenshots are very helpful.

I have a feature suggestion

I'd love to hear it! Send your idea to darilquervo.dev@gmail.com.
